arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp on avoiding management: ‘Steven Gerrard and Frank Lampard aged overnight’
arts.sum: The former Tottenham, Liverpool and England midfielder said he did not want the ‘pain’ of being a manager

arts.ttl: Coventry vs Stoke City live news, action and reaction from CBS Arena
arts.sum: Mark Robins makes his first return to Coventry since the end of his long spell in charge in November and he needs the points to try to push his new club away from the wrong end of the division. Stoke are tasked with building on a 0-0 home draw with Watford last time out while Lampard has won eight of his last nine to gatecrash the top six.

arts.ttl: Coventry's best run since 1970 - what is Lampard doing right?
arts.sum: BBC Sport takes a look at Coventry's revival under Frank Lampard ahead of the return of predecessor Mark Robins to the CBS Arena with Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Jon Walters role in Stoke City upheaval questioned as one huge decision praised
arts.sum: Stoke City sporting director Jon Walters has been questioned over the decision to sack head coach Steven Schumacher and replace him with Narcis Pelach. “On the basis of Pelach and the sacking of Schumacher, which was premature, we don't know that, as sporting director, he [Walters] directly made those decisions.

arts.ttl: Championship clubs vote on FFP rules for next season and what it means for Coventry City budget
arts.sum: Championship clubs have voted to tweak rather than overhaul their profit and sustainability rules for next season. EFL rivals have been running working groups on how best to go forward with financial fair play amid concerns over disparities between the Premier League and the rest as well as those in the Championship with and without parachute payments, such as Coventry City .

arts.ttl: The number one transfer problem Stoke City must solve this summer
arts.sum: Stoke managed to do it with their goalkeeper last summer when they brought in Viktor Johansson and a bit of that kind of magic in other positions would be a dream. There will be a reliance on loan players again but hopefully Stoke can come out of the next window having ticked off a few more positions with their own signings they can really rely on, ready to try to tick off a couple more in the next window.

arts.ttl: Every Championship free agent available to Coventry City this summer
arts.sum: Lewis Baker, Lynden Gooch, Jordan Thompson, Michael Rose, Jack Bonham, Enda Stevens, Frank Fielding, Emre Tezgel Coventry City's summer transfer business is very much up in the air at the minute with the club's recruitment department potentially planning for two different scenarios after the Sky Blues put themselves right in contention for the Championship play-offs.

arts.ttl: Stoke City will stay up but injury saga has left me baffled
arts.sum: It’s too tight to be certain, of course, and football has a nasty habit of kicking you up the backside sometimes but I’ve got faith in Mark Robins and the return of players from injury will help raise standards in training as well as on match days. Now Manhoef is fit again there’s competition for places with Junho and Koumas and it’s up to them to break the back line and link in the top third with quick and clever play, two-touch football, turns and dribbles.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard reborn: The inside story of his second coming at Coventry - thanks to a chat with Pep Guardiola, killing off egos and the shocking revelation at Chelsea that changed his entire managerial style
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY IAN LADYMAN: Frank Lampard is sitting behind a small table in a small room and is poking a bit of fun at himself. Superstitions? Yeah, he's had a few.

arts.ttl: Coventry City contract news as Frank Lampard secures services of another Sky Blues stalwart
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has handed Ben Wilson a new contract to lengthen the goalkeeper's potential time at Coventry City - the player signing a two-and-a-half year extension to tie him to the CBS Arena until June 2027. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.
